---
title: "clustering-noise"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(mvtnorm)
library(scatterplot3d)
library(cluster)
library(MASS)
library(FPDclustering)
library(MixGHD)
library(kernlab)
library(mlbench)
library(dbscan)

set.seed(865)
```

```{r}
# non-convex data in the shape of a triple helix with three non-overlapping 
# clusters and consistent cluster size

t <- seq(-1,4*pi,length.out=200) * rnorm(200,mean=1,sd=0.04)

# noise data

noise_x <- runif(50,-6,6)
noise_y <- runif(50,-6,6)
noise_z <- runif(50,-20,70)

# cluster 1
x3_1 <- cos(t)
x3_2 <- sin(t)
x3_3 <- 4*t 
# * rnorm(200,mean=1,sd=0.01)

# cluster 2
x3_4 <- cos(t+ pi)
x3_5 <- sin(t+ pi)
x3_6 <- 4*t 
# * rnorm(200,mean=1,sd=0.01)

# cluster 3
x3_7 <- cos(t+ 4*pi/3)
x3_8 <- sin(t+ 4*pi/3)
x3_9 <- 4*t
# * rnorm(200,mean=1,sd=0.01)

noise <- cbind(noise_x,noise_y,noise_z)
X3_1 <- cbind(x3_1,x3_2,x3_3)
X3_2 <- cbind(x3_4,x3_5,x3_6)
#X3_3 <- cbind(x3_7,x3_8,x3_9)

X3 <- rbind(X3_1,X3_2,noise)

trueX3 <- c(rep(5:6,each=200),rep('grey',50))

scatterplot3d(X3,color=trueX3,pch=19)
```
```{r Single Linkage 1}
single = agnes(X3, method = 'single')
plot(single)
scatterplot3d(X3,color=cutree(single, 3),pch=19)
```

```{r Spectral 1}
spectral <- specc(X3, centers = 2)
scatterplot3d(X3, color=spectral, pch=19)
```

```{r DBSCAN 1}
db <- dbscan(X3, eps=2, minPts = 15)
scatterplot3d(X3, color=db$cluster +1, pch=19)
```

```{r HDBSCAN 1}
hdb <- hdbscan(X3, minPts = 20)
scatterplot3d(X3, color=hdb$cluster +1, pch=19)
```

```{r ARI 1}
print("Single Linkage:")
ARI(trueX3, cutree(single, 4))
print("Spectral Clustering:")
ARI(trueX3, spectral)
print("DBSCAN:")
ARI(trueX3, db$cluster)
print("HDBSCAN:")
ARI(trueX3, hdb$cluster)
```
